chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permitted to Be Slaughtered in the Sanctuary and Taken Outside

text: 2385 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «كُلُّ مَا لَمْ يَصُفَّ مِنَ اَلطَّيْرِ فَهُوَ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلدَّجَاجِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2385 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said: "Any bird that does not glide in flight is regarded as being like domesticated chickens."
